diagrams.title: Recurrence Tree for D(4)
diagrams.description: Shows how D(4) = 9 is derived from D(3) and D(2) using the recurrence relation
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the recurrence computation step by step

diagrams.title: Inclusion-Exclusion for Derangements
diagrams.description: Venn diagram showing how derangements are computed by subtracting permutations with fixed points using inclusion-exclusion
elements: Subtract: permutations with ≥1 fixed point = C(n,1)(n-1)!
Add back: permutations with ≥2 fixed points = C(n,2)(n-2)!
Continue alternating until all fixed points are accounted
diagrams.purpose: Understand the derivation of the inclusion-exclusion formula

diagrams.title: D(n)/n! Convergence to 1/e
diagrams.description: Graph showing how D(n)/n! approaches 1/e ≈ 0.3679 as n increases
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the convergence of derangement probability to 1/e
